name: Millenium Forum Theatre
content: The folks at the theater are very nice. When I tried reserving a ticket for a show online, there was some issue with the payment system and my reservation couldn’t go through. I emailed them about the issue, the staff kept the seat open for me (at a sold out show, no less), and I paid when I arrived in person for the show, several months later. The show itself, Foil Arms and Hog’s Hogwash, was a lot of fun as well Don’t ask me why I watched this show twice in the span of a month. Scheduling is hard..
